docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY MAROOSIS CHARLES AS TO DEFENDANT BOUREKAS GEORGE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-31-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-19-1992 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01 TRIAL OF AUG-31-1992 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
